seoTitle: Oombulgurri vs Ora Banda — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Oombulgurri and Ora Banda. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Oombulgurri vs Ora Banda: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Oombulgurri and Ora Banda.
heading: Oombulgurri vs Ora Banda — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Oombulgurri, Western Australia and Ora Banda, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Oombulgurri has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Ora Banda (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Oombulgurri or Ora Banda safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Oombulgurri has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Ora Banda scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Oombulgurri scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Ora Banda scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Oombulgurri or Ora Banda?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Oombulgurri has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
